name: World Food Programme Haiti
mission: Deliver emergency food assistance and support long-term food security in Haiti.
programs: School meals, nutrition support, and cash-based transfers.
impact: Assisted over 1 million people with lifesaving food aid during crises.
description: Provides emergency food relief and programs to improve nutrition and resilience across Haiti.

name: UNICEF Haiti
mission: Protect children’s rights and provide health, education, and water services.
programs: Vaccination campaigns, childhood education, and water sanitation.
impact: Supported millions of Haitian children with vaccines and clean water access.
description: Supports Haitian children with health, education, and emergency response services.

name: IOM Haiti
mission: Assist migrants, support displaced families, and improve migration management.
programs: Shelter aid, cash assistance, and return support for migrants.
impact: Helped thousands of displaced families relocate safely during disasters.
description: Provides protection and assistance for migrants and displaced communities in Haiti.

name: Haitian Red Cross
mission: Provide emergency response, first aid, and disaster preparedness nationwide.
programs: Disaster response, health services, and community training.
impact: Coordinated relief for thousands after earthquakes and hurricanes.
description: Delivers emergency rescue, medical assistance, and disaster readiness training in Haiti.

name: Zanmi Lasante (Partners In Health)
mission: Strengthen rural health systems and make quality healthcare available to all.
programs: Hospital care, community health worker networks, and maternal health.
impact: Built health infrastructure serving hundreds of thousands of rural Haitians.
description: Partners with local communities to provide healthcare and public health services in rural Haiti.

name: Food For The Poor Haiti
mission: Provide food, housing, emergency relief, and sustainable development to the less fortunate.
programs: Housing construction, agricultural support, and food distribution.
impact: Built thousands of homes and distributed essential resources across Haiti.
description: One of the largest relief organizations in Haiti, focusing on infrastructure, food supply, and housing.

name: Heifer International Haiti
mission: Work with smallholder farmers to end hunger and poverty while caring for the Earth.
programs: Livestock distribution, agroforestry, and women's cooperatives.
impact: Boosted local economies and food security for thousands of rural families.
description: Empowers rural community farmers with livestock, agricultural resources, and business literacy.

name: Haitian Health Foundation
mission: Deliver essential medical care and nutrition services to rural Haitian communities.
programs: Outpatient clinics, sustainable agriculture, and child nutrition support.
impact: Served tens of thousands of patients with lifesaving medical and nutrition aid in Grand'Anse.
description: Provides rural healthcare, nutrition, and economic support for families in Haiti.

name: SOIL Haiti
mission: Transform ecological wastes into rich organic soil to restore soil fertility and sanitation.
programs: EcoSan toilets, composting facilities, and agricultural research.
impact: Provided safe, dignified sanitation to thousands and produced metric tons of organic compost.
description: Promotes public sanitation and ecological restoration through household composting toilets.

name: Alliad
mission: Deliver emergency assistance and support long-term resilience-building programs.
programs: Emergency relief, women's economic empowerment, and food security.
impact: Supported thousands of families through emergency cash and resilience projects.
description: Provides humanitarian aid and long-term development programs across the territory.

name: Haiti Live
mission: Improve public health through medical training and health systems support.
programs: Training for clinicians, medical supply distribution, and public health campaigns.
impact: Trained dozens of local clinicians and improved community emergency response capacity.
description: Works with local partners to strengthen health systems and emergency care.

name: Hope for Haiti
address: Boulevard des Quatre Chemins, Les Cayes
mission: Improve the quality of life for the Haitian people, particularly children.
programs: School infrastructure, clean water access, and economic development.
impact: Supported over 400,000 people annually through healthcare and educational support.
description: Focuses on micro-grants, infrastructure, and public resources in southern Haiti.

name: Sadhana Haiti
mission: Promote ecological restoration, water conservation, and food security via agroforestry.
programs: Planting food-growing trees, community training, and vegan nutrition education.
impact: Planted thousands of indigenous trees to combat desertification in the South-East.
description: An environmental NGO focusing on long-term ecological restoration and food security.

name: Prodev Haiti
mission: Promote youth development and civic education across schools in Haiti.
programs: Teacher professional training, school management, and summer camps.
impact: Empowered thousands of underserved students with standard civic and regular education.
description: A local foundation dedicated to ensuring high-quality education for all Haitian children.

name: Fonkoze Foundation
mission: Provide non-financial development services to ultra-poor women in rural Haiti.
programs: Adult literacy, health education, and ultra-poverty graduation programs.
impact: Accompanied thousands of rural women to cross the extreme poverty line safely.
description: Works alongside microfinance to support extreme-poor families with educational development.
